# Error Patterns

## Daily Review Timeout Handling

Daily review Opus invocation has timeout (configured via daily_review_timeout_ms, default 300s). Timeout aborts review generation. Partial results may be stored. Manual trigger allows retry.

_Source: `CLAUDE.md`_

_Tags: `daily-review`, `error-handling`_

## Cold-Start Knowledge Scan Timeouts

Cold-start scan reads project files and invokes Haiku. Can timeout if project is large or Haiku is slow. Timeout configured via knowledge_scan_patterns + file selection strategy.

_Source: `CLAUDE.md`_

_Tags: `knowledge`, `error-handling`_

## Symlink Verification on Install

Installation verifies symlinks created correctly. If symlink fails (permission, existing file), install logs error and halts. Manual cleanup may be needed.

_Source: `CLAUDE.md`_

_Tags: `installation`, `error-handling`_

## Database Query Failures in Route Handlers

Route handlers log structured errors with request context on DB query failures. Pattern: catch → log with session_id/path → 500 response. Better-sqlite3 errors include sqlite error codes.

_Source: `CLAUDE.md`_

_Tags: `error-handling`, `logging`_

## Knowledge Extraction Haiku Timeout

Haiku invocation for knowledge extraction can timeout (configured via knowledge_max_tokens, knowledge_max_events_per_prompt). Timeout falls back to partial results or marks extraction failed. Configurable timeout.

_Source: `CLAUDE.md`_

_Tags: `knowledge`, `error-handling`_

## Ingest Failures Logged to collector_errors Table

Ingestion failures (parse error, DB insert error) logged to collector_errors table with occurred_at, hook_type, error_message, raw_input. Provides audit trail of collection problems.

_Source: `CLAUDE.md`_

_Tags: `ingestion`, `error-logging`_
